v 
 
BYAMBO BITANSHI 
Ntendekelo ya mfunjishilo ya katataka yaimena pa kwingijisha byaketekelwa kubiwa 
(competence-based curriculum) amo bafunda mobafwainwa kufunda kuuba ne kulenga 
bintu kwingijisha maana akatataka ne buyuke. Nanchi kwingijisha competence based 
(CBC) kwaleta lupimpu ne kuwamishako mfunjilo ya bafunda. Kipamo kitala pa lufunjisho 
kyayukishatu bulongo makatazho eya na mambo aluno lupimpu lwa mfujilo yakatataka. 
Onkao mambo, kipamo kitala pa kufunda kyanengezha ne kupana byakwingijisha pa 
kufunjisha pa kuuba amba kufunda kulumbulukenga bulongo. 
Ino ntendekelo ya mfunjishilo ya mu Kikaonde ya shikamana pa mizhilo ya buyuke 
(competence based) ayo itundaika kufunda pabyo tupitamo mu moba abumi bwetu. 
Nanchi byaketekelwa kubiwa nobe kumvwañana, ndangulukilo yazhika, maana 
akupwisha makatazho, kulanguluka na kusabaula, kwilangulukilako, kuyuka kwingijisha 
makopyunta ne intaneti ne busulu byo byaingijishiwa mu buuku wa Curriculum 
Framework. Kabiji ino mitwe-kache, yaketekelwa kubiwa bulongo mukweseka kukwasha 
kufikizha mfunjilo ya buyuke nangwa amba CBC. Abino byaimena pa kuteshako muchima 
ne kwimika bipimo byawama byaketekelwa kubiwa. Onkao mambo, naketekela namba 
kuno kufunda kwa kwingijisha CBC mu Kikaonde mu Fomu 1, kusa kukwashako 
kuwamisha, kwatanchikiwa mu mabuuku a mizhilo ya kyalo aavula nobe, mu bintu 
bikwasha ku lufunjisho kutwajijila (Education for sustainable development), kwa 2023 ne 
kwa Zambia Education Curriculum Framework kwesekana na lutangijilo lwa 2016, alo 
lubena kwamba pa byakonsheka kufikizhiwa lufunjisho kubena Zambia. 
Kunungapotu, uno buuku ubena kumwesha kwibikishako kwa kipamo kitala pa kufunda 
mu kupeezhezhako bafunjishi mu mfujishilo, kupana lutangijilo kupichila mu mingilo 
yapanyiwa ne lweseko lwa bafunda alo lwaimena pa kuuba byaketekelwa bulongo. Bino 
nangwa byonkabyo, bafunjishi batundaikwa kufikizha ino mfunjishilo kupichila mu 
kupesapesa ne kwingijisha maana akusomba kabiji ne kubikilapo maana akwabo pa 
byobya byashalapo pa kimye kyo babena kufunjisha. 
Joel Kamoko (Mr) 
 
Permanent Secretary- Education Services 
Ministry of Education

vi 
 
 
 
LUSANCHILO 
Uno buuku wa Fomu 1 mu Kikaonde walupulwa na bukwasho bwa bangikazhi baji mu 
kipamo kitala pa kufunda kabiji ne babuula kwingila mukino kipamo. Nanchi bantu umo 
umo ne bipamo biimena bevwangilemo ne kubika milanguluko pamo pa byakwingijisha 
buyuke (Competence Based Curriculum). Onkao mambo, kipamo kitala pa lufunjisho 
kyapana lusanchilo ku bonsetu bevwangilemo mukupana milangwe yabo ayo 
yakwashishe mu kunemba uno buuku wa Fomu 1. mu Kikaonde. 
Mukupeezhako nasanchila bonse bamingilo ba ku Curriculum Development Centre, abo 
baingijile na ngovu mukumona amba ma syllabi anembewa ne kupwishiwa bulongo. 
Charles K. Ndkala, (Dr) 
 
Director of Curriculum Development 
Ministry of Education

viii 
 
 
NTENDEKELO 
Uno buuku wa Fomu1 mu Kikaonde wanengezhiwa mujishinda ja kukumya, 
mukukebesha kukwasha bafunjishi kufikizha mfunjishilo bulongo mu ino mfunjilo 
(Curriculum) ya katataka. Auno buuku wa lutangijilo wanengezhiwa kwesekana na 
buyuke bwa 2023 Competence Based Curriculum Syllabus. Uno buuku wanembewa 
mukweseka kukwasha bafunjishi kukonsha kufunjisha nangwa kwa kubuula mabuuku. 
Kabiji mu uno buuku babikamo byakwingijisha, mingilo, lweseko lwa bafunda kwesekana 
na kipimo ne nkebelo ya bafunda. 
Kipamo kitala pa kufunda kyayukishatu bulongo makatazho ajipo pa lupimpu lwa 
kutendeka kufunda kwingijisha buyuke bwa (Curriculum wa Competence Baesd). 
Nkebelo ya kwingijisha Competence Based Curriculum yaleta lupimpu mukuwamishako 
mfunjishilo. Kabiji uno buuku wamwesha patooka kwipana kwa kipimo kitala pa lufunjisho 
mukweseka kukwasha bafunjishi kukonsha kufunjisha bulongo, kupichila mu lutangijilo, 
mingilo yapanyiwa ne lweseko lwaimena pa biketekelo bya buyuke (Competence Based 
Curriculum). Nangwa byonkabyo, bafunjishi batundaikwa kupesapesa ne kusomba pa 
kuuba amba bapwishe lukatazho pa kimye kyo bena kufunjisha. 
Onkao mambo, mingilo ne lweseko lwapanyiwa mukweseka kutundaika kwingila ne 
kulangluka kwazhika mu bafunda kabiji ne kukwatankanya mfunjilo ya bintu byapusana-
pusana pa sukuulu. Bafunjishi batundaikwa kufunjisha kwesekana na nkebelo ya 
bafunda, kupesapesa, kwingijisha mashinda aitabizhiwa umvwe bekimona amba kyakila 
mukuwama. 
Kuno kupeezhako kwa mu mfunjishilo kusa kukwashako bafunda kunonkelamo nangwa 
bafuma mubuzhokoloke bwapusana-pusana. 
Nanchi kyamwekana Patoka amba uno buuku usa kukwashako bafunjishi kufunjisha mu 
ino mfunjilo ya katataka ya kwingijisha buyuke (Competence Based) mu kutundaika 
bafunda na maana akuyuka ne kwikala na byubilo byawama mu mfunjilo.

ix 
 
 
BYAKWINGJISHA UNO BUUKU 
Mingilo yanengezhiwa mu uno buuku yafwayinwa kufunjishiwa mu temu 1 Fomu 1. 
Nanchi uno buuku bamwabanya mu bishina bibiji kabiji mu bino bishina muji bibese 
byapusana-pusana nobe, kutanga, byambo, nchikameno ne nembelo. Mu kunungapotu, 
uno buuku kechi ke lufunjisho  ine. Mufunjishi watundaikwa kunengezha lufunjisho 
kufuma mu uno buuku saka akyangye kufunjisha. Monai amba mwatolamo mingilo mu 
bibese byapusana-pusana apa bino mwanemba lufunjisho lwa pajuuba-pajuuba. 
Pa kunengezha lufunjisho, monai amba mwasalamo bintu ne mingilo yo musa kufunjisha 
bafunda mu byaketekelwa kubiwa. Nanchi kimo kimye lufunjisho lwakosha kwikala na 
byaketekelwa kubiwa kukilapo. Onkao mambo, obewa pamo nobe mufunjishi wafwainwa 
kumona kibese kibena kukebewa kutaiwapo kimye kyabaya. Kabiji yuka amba mingilo 
yonse yapanyiwa mu byaketekelwa kubiwa kechi yafwainwa kufunjishiwatu mu lufunjisho 
lumo ne, bino yafwainwa kufunjishiwa mu mafunjsho aavula. 
 
 
MASHINDA ASALWA KWINGIJISHA 
Kimye kyonse mufunjishi saka akyangye kufunjisha wafwainwa kumona mu syllabus 
wa fomu 1 ne kumona mashinda obapana akufunjishilamo Litilicha. Kabiji 
Mufunjishi watundaikwa kwingijisha mashinda apusana-pusana kwesekana na 
nkebelo ya bafunda.

Byonse bijimo:

(Litilicha).

Uno mutwe wanema mambo waanshika kitendekesho kya kumvwisha ne kusanta pa 
mashinda apusana-pusana akunembelamo ne kuvundumwinamo milangwe yazhika mu

buyuke bwa bintu byaitabilwa mu bisho byabo. 
Byonse byaketekelwa kubiwa: Milangwe yazhika, kwingijila pamo ne mbulañeno. 
Kongola / kalobo:

baimbile lwimbo wantanda. Jibumba ja makayo najo jakaile kisela kisekesha  kubanteleki.
